DOMESTIC SCIENCE DEPART.


MEETS IN NEW HOME.


The domestic science department
Of the Woman's club met In the
new club home on Ninth avenue
yesterday afternoon and listened
with interest to q lecture by Miss
Anna Rogers, who gave numerous
helpful hints pertaining to the art
of housekeeping and homo man
agement.
